com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions

Interface Concurrent

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Action, AutocloseableIterator.Factory<Action>, Composite, Iterable<Action>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent, Concurrent.Base

    public interface Concurrent
extends Composite
    An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed concurrently.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  Concurrent.Base
      A class that represents a collection of actions that should be executed concurrently.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action

        Action.Synthesized, Action.Visitor
